global.description: The ad features a bold red background with prominent text and decorative shapes.
global.main_message: Promoting the PulsePlay service with an exclusive offer.

elements.label: Red gradient background
elements.description: A vibrant red gradient background that fills the entire canvas.

elements.label: PulsePlay logo
elements.description: The logo 'PulsePlay' is prominently displayed in bold, black font at the top center.

elements.label: Exclusive offer text
elements.description: Text reading 'Exclusive tonight New hits every week' in white, centered below the logo.

elements.label: Circular shape
elements.description: A light-colored circular shape positioned in the center, adding visual interest.

elements.label: Small circle
elements.description: A smaller light-colored circle located below the larger circular shape.

elements.label: Another small circle
elements.description: Another small light-colored circle positioned next to the previous one.

elements.label: Square shape
elements.description: A light-colored square shape located below the circular elements.

elements.label: Main headline
elements.description: The bold text 'PulsePlay' at the top of the ad, capturing immediate attention.

elements.label: Additional offer text
elements.description: Text stating 'Exclusive tonight New hits every week' in a clear, readable font.
elements.text_content: Exclusive tonight New hits every week

elements.label: Call to action
elements.description: A prominent button with the text '€19.99 Start now' at the bottom, encouraging action.
